description_long: This jewelry set features a double-stranded necklace and a pair of matching earrings, displayed on a white bust stand. The necklace is composed of large, round, and oval beads in a vibrant coral red, interspersed with smaller turquoise and silver-toned beads, creating a striking color contrast. The strands are connected by triangular silver connectors, adding a geometric accent to the design. The earrings echo the necklace's motif, with triangular silver mounts and a central red bead. The necklace's upper strand appears to be slightly shorter, allowing the lower strand to drape elegantly. The overall style is bold and colorful, with a vintage or Southwestern-inspired aesthetic.
description: A double-stranded coral red and turquoise beaded necklace with matching triangular silver and red earrings, displayed on a white bust. The design is bold, colorful, and geometric.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered depth of the necklace strands and the way they drape along the bust.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full arrangement of the necklace and earrings, with all beads and geometric connectors visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, emphasizing the necklace's clasp and the alignment of the beads along the neck.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bust and the necklace's closure, with minimal detail of the jewelry's front.
